lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in mint condition. Both the exterior and interior show no signs of wear or damage. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order.
The car is in poor condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and minor dents, and the interior shows noticeable wear. All mechanical systems are operational but will require maintenance soon.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic repairs to be roadworthy. The engine has a persistent oil leak and a loud knocking sound, while the transmission slips noticeably during gear changes. The exterior has visible rust on the wheel wells and several large dents, and the interior upholstery is heavily worn and stained. This car is being sold as-is and is best suited for a mechanic or as a project for parts.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive mechanical and cosmetic repairs to be roadworthy. The engine is difficult to start and produces significant smoke when running, indicating major internal issues. The transmission is slipping, and the brakes are unresponsive. Additionally, the body has significant rust and several large dents. This car is being sold as-is and is recommended for parts or a complete restoration project; it should be towed rather than driven.

Get ready to hit the road in this fantastic find! This car is in good condition and has been clearly well-cared for over the years. It drives smoothly and looks great, showing only minor cosmetic wear that reflects its reliable history. It’s a wonderful choice for anyone seeking a solid, attractive vehicle that’s ready for many more miles!

This exceptional vehicle is presented in immaculate, showroom-quality condition, reflecting a standard of maintenance that is truly beyond reproach. Boasting a flawless aesthetic and peak mechanical performance, this unit offers a rare opportunity to acquire a pristine example of automotive excellence. Discerning buyers will appreciate the uncompromising integrity and refined presentation of this premier offering.

Hey there! I'm honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home! This car is in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied it since day one, kept it garaged, and it’s spotless inside and out. If you’re looking for something that feels brand new without the brand-new price tag, this is the one! Come take a look, you won't be disappointed! ✨

Offering an investment-grade E46 M3 in concours condition. This specimen features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, boasting factory individual throttle bodies and a linear power band up to its 8,000 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a crisp Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission and a perfectly calibrated limited-slip differential. Mechanically optimized with a documented VANOS overhaul and proactive subframe reinforcement, the chassis remains rigid and true to factory geometry. Finished in flawless Carbon Black over Nappa leather, this vehicle retains its original bushings and exhibits zero fluid seepage or oxidative wear. A turn-key collector piece for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history included. Inspection welcome.

This vehicle is a true collector’s dream, preserved in a state that mirrors the day it rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior boasts a deep, glass-like finish with zero imperfections, scratches, or swirl marks, having been protected in a climate-controlled garage its entire life. Inside, the premium leather remains supple and fragrant, showing absolutely no wear on the bolsters or stitching. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the precision navigation, functions flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine bay is immaculate, reflecting a rigorous maintenance schedule performed exclusively by certified technicians with full service records included. The drive is tight, responsive, and whisper-quiet, riding on a fresh set of high-performance tires with maximum tread. This is not just a used car; it is a meticulously curated piece of automotive excellence for the discerning buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in impeccable showroom condition and exhibiting an uncompromising standard of excellence. This unit has been meticulously preserved, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains in a pristine, original state. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. This represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a vehicle of unrivaled caliber.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and possessing a flawless mechanical pedigree. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast seeking an uncompromising driving experience.

Hey there! I’m honestly so excited to pass this beauty along to a new home. It’s in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, you’d think it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically perfect and ready for its next adventure, this is definitely the one for you. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Offered is a museum-grade E46 M3, showcasing impeccable mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation. The high-revving S54 inline-six delivers linear power through its six independent throttle bodies, mated to a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. This example features a reinforced rear subframe and a comprehensive Vanos overhaul, ensuring structural and valvetrain longevity. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from original suspension geometry and bushings in pristine state. Finished in Carbon Black over Cinnamon Nappa
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Maintenance records available.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that redefines the standard for 'mint' condition. This car has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage and shows as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint retains a deep, glass-like luster with absolutely zero swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections. Inside, the premium leather upholstery remains supple and carries that distinct new-car aroma, entirely free from wear, creasing, or sun damage. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced climate control, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach; it boasts a comprehensive service history with every scheduled maintenance performed ahead of schedule by certified master technicians using only genuine OEM parts. The engine bay is spotless, and the undercarriage is as clean as the bodywork. Included with the sale are both sets of original keys, the complete set of owner’s manuals, and a detailed binder of all service receipts. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to acquire a specimen of unrivaled quality and preservation.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of unparalleled distinction. This specimen remains in pristine, showroom condition, having been maintained to the most exacting standards. Its aesthetic and mechanical integrity are beyond reproach, representing the absolute pinnacle of its class. An acquisition for the discerning collector who demands nothing short of perfection.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle of investment-grade quality. This motorcar remains in impeccable, showroom-grade condition, reflecting a standard of preservation rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, has been meticulously maintained to satisfy the most discerning collector. An uncompromising choice for those who demand excellence.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely pristine, showroom-level condition—it's been babied since day one and looks like it just rolled off the lot. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically flawless and ready for a new adventure, you’ve found it! Feel free to reach out with any questions, I'm happy to chat!
Offered is an uncompromising example of automotive engineering in concours-level condition. This specimen features a high-revving, naturally aspirated inline-six with
Pristine condition. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title.

This vehicle is an absolute masterpiece, preserved in a state that rivals its original debut on the showroom floor. Finished in a deep, lustrous metallic paint that has been meticulously ceramic coated, the exterior is completely devoid of any swirls, stone chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of luxury; the premium leather seats show zero signs of wear, the bolsters are firm, and the factory-fresh scent still lingers. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity surround sound system to the dual-zone climate control, functions with absolute precision. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, boasting a fully documented history of rigorous preventative maintenance and exclusively garage-kept storage. With exceptionally low mileage and a chassis that has never seen a salted winter road, it drives with the tightness and responsiveness of a brand-new machine. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a truly immaculate, investment-grade example.

Presented in exemplary condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Every facet, from the flawless exterior finish to the meticulously maintained interior, reflects a standard of care synonymous with showroom quality. This is an unparalleled opportunity for the discerning enthusiast seeking a turn-key asset of the highest caliber.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Presented in impeccable showroom condition, it features a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Meticulously maintained and mechanically absolute, this specimen offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands excellence without exception.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, she’s a total beauty. This car is in truly immaculate condition—seriously, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been pampered its whole life, kept in a garage, and drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s practically brand new and ready for the road, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you definitely won't be disappointed!

This FD3S RX-7 represents a benchmark example of Mazda’s sequential twin-turbocharged 13B-REW rotary powerplant. Meticulously maintained, the engine exhibits exceptional compression across all rotor faces, with the primary and secondary Hitachi HT12 turbochargers providing a seamless transition and linear power delivery through the five-speed manual gearbox. The chassis remains rigid, featuring an untouched double-wishbone suspension geometry and a Torsen limited-slip differential that ensures optimal torque distribution. Every component, from the uncracked dash to the pristine undercarriage, reflects a true collector-grade specimen. Zero fluid seepage, factory-spec vacuum lines, and a flawless cooling system make this a rare, turnkey performance machine.
Mint condition. Clean title. Garage kept. No scratches or dents. Full service records included. Runs perfectly.

This vehicle is the definition of showroom quality. Meticulously maintained and garage-kept since day one, the exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in factory-fresh condition; the premium leather seats show no signs of wear, the original floor mats are spotless, and every electronic feature operates exactly as intended. Mechanically, it is flawless, featuring a comprehensive service history from certified technicians and exceptionally low mileage that ensures a smooth, powerful driving experience. This is a rare opportunity for a collector or discerning enthusiast to own a truly pristine example that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line. Every detail, from the engine bay to the undercarriage, has been kept in peak condition.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to the highest standards of preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of fastidious ownership. From the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class for the discerning collector or enthusiast seeking an unrivaled driving experience.
